pve_actions.name: Heavy Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 160.
Additional Effect: 20% chance of granting Hawk's Eye
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Straight Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 200.
Can only be executed when under the effect of Hawk's Eye or Barrage.

pve_actions.name: Raging Strikes
pve_actions.effect:
Increases damage dealt by 15%.
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Venomous Bite
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Additional Effect: Venom
Potency: 15
Duration: 45s

pve_actions.name: Bloodletter
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 130.
Maximum Charges: 3
Shares a recast timer with Rain of Death.

pve_actions.name: Repelling Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Jump 10 yalms away from current target.
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Quick Nock
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 110 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: 20% chance of granting Hawk's Eye
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Wide Volley
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 140 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Barrage Potency: 220
Can only be executed while under the effect of Hawk's Eye or Barrage.

pve_actions.name: Windbite
pve_actions.effect:
Deals wind damage with a potency of 60.
Additional Effect: Wind damage over time
Potency: 20
Duration: 45s

pve_actions.name: Mage's Ballad
pve_actions.effect:
Grants Mage's Ballad to self and all party members within 50 yalms, increasing damage dealt by 1%.
Duration: 45s
Additional Effect: 80% chance to grant Repertoire
This effect can trigger repeatedly while singing the Mage's Ballad.
Repertoire Effect: Reduces the recast time of Heartbreak Shot and Rain of Death by 7.5s
Additional Effect: Grants Mage's Coda
Can only be executed while in combat.

pve_actions.name: The Warden's Paean
pve_actions.effect:
Removes one select detrimental effect from self or target party member. If the target is not enfeebled, a barrier is created nullifying the target's next detrimental effect suffered.
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Barrage
pve_actions.effect:
Grants Barrage, allowing the use of Refulgent Arrow and Shadowbite. Upon execution, Refulgent Arrow will strike the selected target three times, while Shadowbite's potency will be increased to 300.
Duration: 10s
Additional Effect: Grants Resonant Arrow Ready
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Army's Paeon
pve_actions.effect:
Grants Army's Paeon to self and all party members within 50 yalms, increasing direct hit rate by 3%.
Duration: 45s
Additional Effect: 80% chance to grant Repertoire
This effect can trigger repeatedly while singing the Army's Paeon.
Repertoire Effect: Reduces weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay by 4%
Can be stacked up to 4 times.
Additional Effect: Grants Army's Coda
Can only be executed while in combat.

pve_actions.name: Rain of Death
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Maximum Charges: 3
Shares a recast timer with Heartbreak Shot.

pve_actions.name: Battle Voice
pve_actions.effect:
Increases direct hit rate of self and all nearby party members by 20%.
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: The Wanderer's Minuet
pve_actions.effect:
Grants the Wanderer's Minuet to self and all party members within 50 yalms, increasing critical hit rate by 2%.
Duration: 45s
Additional Effect: 80% chance to grant Repertoire
This effect can trigger repeatedly while singing the Wanderer's Minuet.
Repertoire Effect: Allows execution of Pitch Perfect
Can be stacked up to 3 times.
Additional Effect: Grants Wanderer's Coda
Can only be executed while in combat.

pve_actions.name: Pitch Perfect
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to the target and all enemies nearby it. Potency varies with number of Repertoire stacks, dealing full damage for the first enemy, and 50% less for all remaining enemies.
1 Repertoire Stack: 100
2 Repertoire Stacks: 220
3 Repertoire Stacks: 360
Can only be executed when the Wanderer's Minuet is active and you have at least one stack of Repertoire.

pve_actions.name: Empyreal Arrow
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 260.
Additional Effect: Grants Repertoire while singing Mage's Ballad, Army's Paeon, or the Wanderer's Minuet

pve_actions.name: Iron Jaws
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100.
Additional Effect: If the target is suffering from a Caustic Bite or Stormbite effect inflicted by you, the effect timer is reset
Additional Effect: 35% chance of granting Hawk's Eye
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Sidewinder
pve_actions.effect: Delivers an attack with a potency of 400.

pve_actions.name: Troubadour
pve_actions.effect:
Reduces damage taken by self and nearby party members by 15%.
Duration: 15s
Effect cannot be stacked with machinist's Tactician or dancer's Shield Samba.

pve_actions.name: Caustic Bite
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 150.
Additional Effect: Poison
Potency: 20
Duration: 45s
Additional Effect: 35% chance of granting Hawk's Eye
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Stormbite
pve_actions.effect:
Deals wind damage with a potency of 100.
Additional Effect: Wind damage over time
Potency: 25
Duration: 45s
Additional Effect: 35% chance of granting Hawk's Eye
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Nature's Minne
pve_actions.effect:
Increases HP recovery via healing actions by 15% for self and nearby party members.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Refulgent Arrow
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 280.
Can only be executed when under the effect of Hawk's Eye or Barrage.

pve_actions.name: Shadowbite
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 200 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Barrage Potency: 300
Can only be executed when under the effect of Hawk's Eye or Barrage.

pve_actions.name: Burst Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 220.
Additional Effect: 35% chance of granting Hawk's Eye
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Apex Arrow
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 140 to all enemies in a straight line before you.
Soul Voice Gauge Cost: 20
Potency increases up to 700 as Soul Voice Gauge exceeds minimum cost.
Additional Effect: Grants Blast Arrow Ready upon execution while Soul Voice Gauge is 80 or higher
Duration: 10s
Consumes Soul Voice Gauge upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Ladonsbite
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 140 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: 35% chance of granting Hawk's Eye
Duration: 30s

pve_actions.name: Blast Arrow
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 700 for the first enemy, and 50% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Blast Arrow Ready.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Apex Arrow changes to Blast Arrow when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Radiant Finale
pve_actions.effect:
Increases damage dealt by self and nearby party members.
Duration: 20s
Effectiveness is determined by the number of different Coda active in the Song Gauge.
1 Coda: 2%
2 Coda: 4%
3 Coda: 6%
Additional Effect: Grants Radiant Encore Ready
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed when at least 1 coda is active.

pve_actions.name: Heartbreak Shot
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180.
Maximum Charges: 3
Shares a recast timer with Rain of Death.

pve_actions.name: Resonant Arrow
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 640 for the first enemy, and 50% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Resonant Arrow Ready.

pve_actions.name: Radiant Encore
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it.
Potency is determined by the number of different Coda consumed in the Radiant Finale executed prior, dealing full damage for the first enemy, and 50% less for all remaining enemies.
1 Coda: 700
2 Coda: 800
3 Coda: 1,100
Can only be executed while under the effect of Radiant Encore Ready.

pve_actions.name: Leg Graze
pve_actions.effect:
Afflicts target with Heavy +40%.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Second Wind
pve_actions.effect:
Instantly restores own HP.
Cure Potency: 800

pve_actions.name: Foot Graze
pve_actions.effect:
Binds target.
Duration: 10s
Cancels auto-attack upon execution.
Target unbound if damage taken.

pve_actions.name: Peloton
pve_actions.effect:
Increases movement speed of self and nearby party members.
Duration: 30s
Effect ends when enmity is generated. Has no effect in battle.

pve_actions.name: Head Graze
pve_actions.effect: Interrupts the use of a target's action.

pve_actions.name: Arm's Length
pve_actions.effect:
Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects.
Duration: 6s
Additional Effect: When you are struck by a physical attack, the striker will be afflicted with Slow +20%
Duration: 15s

traits.name: Heavier Shot
traits.effect:
Adds to Heavy Shot a 20% chance to grant Hawk's Eye.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Increased Action Damage
traits.effect: Increases base action damage by 10%.

traits.name: Enhanced Quick Nock
traits.effect:
Adds to Quick Nock a 20% chance to grant Hawk's Eye.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Increased Action Damage II
traits.effect: Increases base action damage by 20%.

traits.name: Bite Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Venomous Bite and Windbite to Caustic Bite and Stormbite respectively.

traits.name: Enhanced Empyreal Arrow
traits.effect: Guarantees the trigger of the additional effects for current Mage's Ballad, Army's Paeon, and the Wanderer's Minuet when Empyreal Arrow hits a target.

traits.name: Straight Shot Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Straight Shot to Refulgent Arrow.

traits.name: Wide Volley Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Wide Volley to Shadowbite.

traits.name: Bite Mastery II
traits.effect:
Adds to Stormbite, Caustic Bite, and Iron Jaws a 35% chance to grant Hawk's Eye.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Heavy Shot Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Heavy Shot to Burst Shot.

traits.name: Enhanced Army's Paeon
traits.effect:
While under the effect of Army's Paeon with at least one stack of Repertoire, singing Mage's Ballad or the Wanderer's Minuet will grant Army's Muse, reducing weaponskill cast time and recast time, spell cast time and recast time, and auto-attack delay.
Duration: 10s
Allowing the effect of Army's Paeon and accumulated stacks of Repertoire to expire without singing Mage's Ballad or the Wanderer's Minuet will grant Army's Ethos.
Duration: 30s
While under the effect of Army's Ethos, singing Mage's Ballad or the Wanderer's Minuet will grant Army's Muse. Both Army's Ethos and Army's Muse require stacks of Repertoire, the number of which will determine the potency of the latter.
1 Repertoire: 1%
2 Repertoire: 2%
3 Repertoire: 4%
4 Repertoire: 12%

traits.name: Soul Voice
traits.effect: Increases Soul Voice Gauge by 5 each time Repertoire is granted.

traits.name: Quick Nock Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Quick Nock to Ladonsbite.

traits.name: Enhanced Bloodletter
traits.effect: Allows a third charge of Bloodletter and Rain of Death.

traits.name: Enhanced Apex Arrow
traits.effect:
Grants Blast Arrow Ready upon executing Apex Arrow after the Soul Voice Gauge has reached 80 or higher.
Duration: 10s
Apex Arrow becomes Blast Arrow while under this effect.

traits.name: Enhanced Troubadour
traits.effect: Reduces Troubadour recast time to 90 seconds.

traits.name: Minstrel's Coda
traits.effect: Grants Mage's Coda, Army's Coda, or Wanderer's Coda upon singing Mage's Ballad, Army's Paeon, or the Wanderer's Minuet respectively.

traits.name: Bloodletter Mastery
traits.effect: Upgrades Bloodletter to Heartbreak Shot.

traits.name: Ranged Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Empyreal Arrow to 260, Sidewinder to 400, Refulgent Arrow to 280, Burst Shot to 220, and Apex Arrow to 140 up to 700.

traits.name: Enhanced Barrage
traits.effect:
Grants Resonant Arrow Ready upon executing Barrage.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Troubadour II
traits.effect: Improves Troubadour's damage reduction effect to 15%.

traits.name: Enhanced Radiant Finale
traits.effect:
Grants Radiant Encore Ready upon executing Radiant Finale.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Second Wind
traits.effect: Increases the healing potency of Second Wind to 800.
